DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_CALL_TYPE]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_CALL_TYPE]
( 
	[CallTypeID] [nvarchar](50)  NOT NULL,
	[CallType] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_CallTypeID] [nvarchar](3)  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](10)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [DATETIME]  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
